title: Latest Israel-Lebanon Cease-Fire Shows Little Sign of Taking Hold
summary_full: The U.S.-brokered deal depends on Hezbollah halting its attacks first. But the leader of the Iran-backed group rejected those terms, and Israel said that its offensive would continue.
summary_public: The U.S.-brokered deal depends on Hezbollah halting its attacks first. But the leader of the Iran-backed group rejected those terms, and Israel said that its offensive would continue.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel said that its offensive would continue.
